system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Medicine
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You place your hands upon a person injured by Qi energy or whose Qi energy is imbalanced and draw the Qi into your own body. This must be used Cathartically. Cathartic: Make a Medicine roll against TN 8. On a Success you draw the energy into your body and dissipate it. On a Total Success you draw in the energy and you know the nature of the Technique that delivered it. On a Failure you draw the energy into your body but suffer the effects of it yourself. At the discretion of the GM, some Kung Fu Techniques may cause additional specific effects for using this power. With Weapon Stride, you turn a person’s weapon into an attack path.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
